questions.question: What was the main issue debated at the Council of Jerusalem?
options: Whether Gentiles should pay temple tax
Whether Gentiles must be circumcised and follow the Law of Moses
questions.answer: Whether Gentiles must be circumcised and follow the Law of Moses

questions.question: What caused Paul and Barnabas to part ways?
options: A dispute over taking John Mark with them
Paul wanted to go to Rome
Barnabas wanted to return to Cyprus alone
questions.answer: A dispute over taking John Mark with them

questions.question: The council decided that Gentile believers must be circumcised.
It seemed good to the Holy _____ and to us to lay no greater burden on you than these necessary things.
After the disagreement, Paul chose _____ as his new traveling companion.
